steps.title: Identify the context clue
steps.content: The sail and sailor are both described as idle while waiting for the west wind. This waiting scenario establishes that “idle” refers to a state of non-activity.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: ”Inactive” expresses exactly what the poem describes — a sail not in use and a sailor not actively working. The other three choices have no connection to a waiting maritime scene. That matches choice A — A is correct.
